Live Workshop Integration

Your Brand, Inside My Live Rooms

I run 4–5 live workshops every month with 1,000–2,000 active participants. This is not passive scrolling — this is your brand in a room of highly engaged, career-hungry professionals.

Topmate Workshop Integration

Every workshop I conduct on Topmate is an opportunity for your brand to be part of a real conversation — not just a banner. I integrate your product or service into the session naturally, through live demos, Q&A mentions, and post-session resource drops.

Collaboration Formats

Here's Exactly What I Deliver

Pick a format, or let me build you a custom campaign. Every deliverable comes with a performance report.

🎬

High-Retention Reels

  • Hook-first scripting proven to hit 100K+ views
  • Brand integrated naturally — not forced
  • On-screen CTA driving to your link
  • Collab tag for mutual audience exposure
🗂️

Carousels & Static Posts

  • Swipe-worthy educational carousel design
  • Brand embedded in slide visuals
  • High save & share rates (benchmark: 4.5K saves)
  • Caption CTA linking to brand page
📸

Story Placements

  • Photo story with clickable link sticker
  • Video story with direct CTA overlay
  • Sequential storytelling for campaign arcs
  • Poll / quiz story for interactive engagement
⭐ High ROI
🎓

Live Workshop Integration

  • 4–5 sessions/month · 1K–2K live attendees
  • Live product demo during session
  • Q&A brand discussion — feels organic
  • Resource drop with your CTA link
  • Post-session Instagram reel recap
🔥 Best for Leads
🤖

Comment-to-DM Automation

  • Audience comments a keyword → auto DM fires
  • Your brand link delivered straight to their inbox
  • Qualified, warm leads — not cold traffic
  • Works 24/7 — scales without extra effort
  • Measurable: track every click and conversion
📊

Campaign Analytics Report

  • Post-campaign full performance breakdown
  • Views, reach, saves, shares, profile activity
  • Audience demographic snapshot
  • Honest notes + recommendations for next campaign

How Comment-to-DM Works for Your Brand

I publish a reel or post with a simple CTA — "Comment RESOURCE to get the link." When viewers comment, an automated DM sends your brand's link directly to their inbox. These are warm, self-qualified leads who raised their hand. Not impressions. Not reach. Real people who asked for it.


Past campaigns have generated 500–2000+ DMs per post depending on content virality.
